name: Suspicious Execution of Outlook from Temporary Directory
notes:
This is rule detects Outlook executed from a temporary directory.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Execution in Outlook Temp Folder
SIGMA Description: Detects a suspicious program execution in Outlook temp folder


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\temporary internet files\content.outlook%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Execution of Outlook from Temporary Directory on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\temporary internet files\content.outlook%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Execution of Outlook from Temporary Directory
Event description: Detects Outlook executed from a temporary directory.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
